emails.subject: Re: ENA Government Affairs Report - March 2001
emails.body: thanks for the note; are there any updates to this project that should be noted on the report; thanks Eric Mary Hain@ECT 03/02/2001 04:28 PM

emails.subject: Re: ENA Government Affairs Report - March 2001
emails.body: Here are some FERC cases I'll probably be working on in the next month: (1) In Docket No. EL00-95-?, et al. the Cal ISO and EOB's Motion for Issuance of Refund Notice and (2) Cal PX Compliance filing and request for expedited Commission guidance in EL00-95-015. Also I'll be assisting Gary Fergus and Richard Sanders with our discussion with the ISO about reporting cost of service information. That's about as far ahead as I can see at the moment. Eric Benson ENRON 03/02/2001 02:33 PM
